title: coleus circinnatus
intro: Coleus circinnatus, also known as Coleus aromaticus, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia and Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties that help in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Coleus circinnatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and aid in digestion, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. The herbal preparations of Coleus circinnatus include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, from skin irritations to internal infections.
